title: Greek Feta Toast
description: A simple yet delicious Greek-inspired toast recipe featuring crispy feta, crunchy texture, and a smoky flavor.
instructions: Slice the Greek bread into 1-inch thick slices.
Place the bread slices on a baking sheet.
Drizzle the smoked olive oil over the bread slices.
Bake in the oven for 10-12 minutes or until crispy and golden brown.
Remove the bread from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Crumble the feta cheese over the toasted bread.
Sprinkle fresh parsley over the feta cheese.
